zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Ramsey於大約1525年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾希哈姆時，她的父親Sir Thomas Ramsey24歲，母親Carrie Skyler Fisher21歲。她和Richard Edward Porter至少有1個兒子。她去世於1590年在英國英格蘭維爾爾特洛布利其享年66歲。

nameMeanings.name: Ramsey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish, English, and Irish (Antrim): habitational name from Ramsey (Huntingdonshire, now part of Cambridgeshire), from Old English hramsa ‘wild garlic’ + ēg ‘island, low-lying land’. Alternatively, the name may also arise from Ramsey (Essex), probably from the same etymology as the Huntingdonshire placename. However, this is unlikely to be the source of the Scottish surname. This form of the surname is also common in Ireland, where it is probably in most if not all cases an altered form of Scottish Ramsay .

variants.name: Ramsay
meanings: Scottish and English: variant (the usual spelling in Scotland) of Ramsey . The Scottish Ramsays derive from Simund de Ramesie, recorded before 1175, who went to Scotland from Ramsey (Huntingdonshire).

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Ramsey was born about 1525, in Hitcham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Thomas Ramsey, was 24 and her mother, Carrie Skyler Fisher, was 21. She had at least 1 son with Richard Edward Porter. She died in 1590, in Trowbridge, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66.

Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Richard Edward Porter. Elle est décédée en 1590, à Trowbridge, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Ramsey(이)가 대략 1525년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 히트챔에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Ramsey(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Carrie Skyler Fisher(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 Richard Edward Porter(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1590년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 트로우브리지에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.
